name: Alternate Dumbbell Front Raise Neutral Grip

instructions.starting position: Standing, arms along the body, elbows slightly bent, one dumbbell in each hand, neutral grip.
instructions.execution: Slowly lift one arm forward in an arc until it is parallel to the ground. Squeeze your anterior deltoid for a moment, and then slowly go back to the starting position. Do the same with the other arm. Keep your back straight during the exercise.
